title: Sea Around Us -- Reconstructed Catch Data, GFCM RFMO Area
abstract: Sea Around Us (SAU) reconstructed marine fisheries catch data aggregated to the General Fisheries Commission for the Mediterranean (GFCM) Regional Fisheries Management Organization (RFMO) area, 1950-2019. On inspection, this extract's only area_name value is 'GFCM' -- a Mediterranean and Black Sea RFMO -- so despite being stored in the same 'eco reomote' folder as the Red-Sea-specific SAU EEZ/MEOW extracts, its actual coverage is NOT the Red Sea. Included here for completeness per instructions but flagged as likely mis-scoped or downloaded as a broader reference/comparison set rather than a Red-Sea layer.

resources.name: SAU RFMO 4 catch data (CSV)
resources.path: KAUST - DATA/Ecological/eco reomote/SAU RFMO 4 v50-1/SAU RFMO 4 v50-1.csv

variables.name: area_name
variables.label: RFMO Name
variables.description: RFMO identifier; observed value 'GFCM' (General Fisheries Commission for the Mediterranean) only.

variables.name: fishing_entity
variables.label: Fishing Entity
variables.description: Country/territory attributed with the catch (e.g. Turkey, Albania).

variables.name: tonnes
variables.label: Catch
variables.description: Reconstructed catch weight for the row's species/sector/gear/reporting-status combination.

access.how_to_request: Freely downloadable from seaaroundus.org; local copy retrieved 2026-03-11 per the bundled readme.txt.

provenance.originator: Sea Around Us (University of British Columbia / partners)
provenance.citation: Sea Around Us. Reconstructed catch data, Data version 50.1. Downloaded 11 March 2026. See http://www.seaaroundus.org/citation-policy/ for full citation guidance.

known_issues: IMPORTANT: this extract's only area_name is 'GFCM' (Mediterranean/Black Sea), not a Red Sea RFMO -- consider excluding from a strictly Red-Sea-scoped catalog, or clearly labeling as an out-of-basin reference/comparison dataset. Kept in per task instructions to flag honestly rather than silently drop.

'RFMO 4' in the filename likely refers to the SAU internal RFMO ID, not '4 RFMOs' worth of content -- only GFCM rows were found in this file; not independently confirmed against the full 1.3M-row file (only spot-checked).
bbox/subbasins fields are not meaningful for this record given the mismatch above; bbox given is a rough Mediterranean+Black Sea box, not the Red Sea.
A duplicate .zip archive also exists alongside it (SAU RFMO 4 v50-1.zip) -- not catalogued separately.
